items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the AI-generated parameters, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses the outcome of this validation. The prior steps focus on customer sign-up, booking processes, and adversary attempts, without any mention of the specific scenario behavior related to the AI-generated parameters. Therefore, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
